title: Label Policy
description: Per-team required-label rules. Read by `issues create`, `issues update`, and `context` to surface required labels + enforce them at write time. Keyed by team key.

policies.description: Map of team key → policy. Keys are uppercase Linear team keys (e.g. ENG).

name.description: Human-readable team name (informational; the key is canonical).

required.description: List of required label-prefix groups; each group must be satisfied for a write to succeed.

prefixes.description: Any label whose name starts with one of these prefixes counts toward this group.

min.description: Minimum total label count across the listed prefixes.

max.description: Maximum total count, or null for no upper bound.

description.description: Human-readable hint surfaced in error responses.

allowedPrefixes.description: Master list of label prefixes valid for this team. Used for grouping in context responses.

requiresProject.description: If true, every new issue on this team must have a project set.
